feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Cloud Application Programming Model
feed.subtitle: SAP Cloud Application Programming Model Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: how to provide dynamic values in mta.yaml for dev and prod
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Below is the sample mta.yaml. I am using different db name for prod and dev.  Also i am using docker for srv module. How do we provide dynamic values for db and docker image. I am aware mta extension where we can change only the parameters. Any inputs are appreciated.
_____________________________________

  - name: test-srv
    type: application
    parameters:
      docker:
        image: testingname/testimage:latest
      memory: 1G
      disk-quota: 3G
    requires:
      - name:  test-uaa
      - name: test_dev_db

entry.title: how to trigger CAP side effects in synchronous call
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

How do we trigger side effects when we run the action in CAP fiori elements list page.

It works fine when i press the action and  functions are synchronous, But I am selecting multiple items and using synchronous where side effects are not working as the call is not waited for the function to complete. Any inputs are appreciated

entry.title: Virtual Element problems on SAP CAP
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I am working with SAP CAP and using a Virtual Element to call OData. When testing via Postman or directly accessing the OData endpoint, everything works fine. However, when integrating with Fiori Elements and using Fiori Preview to preview the UI, I encounter an issue where the application continuously sends requests to the backend without stopping. Is it issue Fiori Preview CAP Model?

In my image below infinity request will send after I set to display ToDoProgress(it's virtual element)

Thanks a lot.

entry.title: SAP CAPM service failing with http 407 Proxy Authentication failed Error
entry.content:
I am consuming a SOAP based web service from a S/4HANA On-prem system inside a SAP CAP service using sap-cloud-sdk api's coupled with BTP destinations and cloud connector. 

Reference :https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/consuming-soap-web-services-in-sap-cloud-application-programming-model-cap/ba-p/13522820

I have recently upgraded the @SAP-cloud-sdk/connectivity version to 3.23.0(latest) recently and now the service is failing sometimes with http status code 407- Proxy Authentication failed. The service works most of the time but randomly fails with this error. And once i redeploy the CAP app to CF again the service starts working like usual.

entry.title: The data is not getting updated in the DB, on executing CAP Odata V4 service from SAP UI5 App
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm facing a problem while creating records in my HANA cloud trial instance. The data is not getting updated in the HC DB, however on executing service (it is a CAP Odata V4) from SAP UI5 app, the response is '201 Created'.

SAPUI5 code;

service.cds :

And schema.cds is as follows:

Any thoughts what is the reason and suggestions for possible resolution?

Thanks,

Varad

entry.title: CAP OData filter parsing
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am looking for a way to convert an OData filter to a CqnPredicate. I would like to have a generic action that takes a filter coming from a UI5 items binding and send this as a payload to my Java CAP CDS action. 
Is there such a functionality that be used programatically ? 

Since this is done automatically for ReadEventContext I would think it exists.

Thank you

entry.title: How can i extract data from a table created in Flexible Programming Model custom page?
entry.content:
We have developed a CAPM application using the Flexible Programming Model (FPM) for the UI.
We need to retrieve the data from the table and send it to the backend Node.js layer for further processing. However, we are currently unable to fetch the entire table's data.

In the FPM application, selecting a particular row allows us to retrieve the data from the table, but our requirement is to fetch the entire table's data without selecting a row.

Could someone please help with this?

entry.title: VS Code Extension constantly opens cds-rc.json file
entry.content:
I'm using the SAP CDS Language Support extension for VS Code. Every few minutes a file called cds-rc.json opens in the editor, in place of the file I'm working on.  Is there a way to disable this?

I'm on the latest version of the extension (v8.5.0)

entry.title: Error in a script to store a column in CSV payload and assign in property
entry.content:
I have written a script to store a column of csv payload in a property but getting the following error. any help will be appreciated.

 

import com.sap.it.api.mapping.*;
import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import java.util.HashMap;

def Message processData(Message message) {

def csvpayload = message.getpayload(java.lang.String.class)

def csvRows = csvpayload.split('\n')

def lastRow = csvRows[csvRows.size()-1]

def lastRowCoulmns = lastRow.split(',')

def lastCoulmn = lastRowCoulmns[lastRowCoulmns.size()-1]

message.setHeader('lastColumn', lastColumn)

retun message

}

 

Error:

 

java.lang.NoSuchMethodException: No signature of method: com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.processor.MessageImpl.getpayload() is applicable for argument types: (java.lang.Class) values: [class java.lang.String]

entry.title: Troubles connecting to HANA Cloud from BAS
entry.content:
I am having troubles connecting to HANA DB from a local server instance in BAS.
The issue appears when triggering an endpoint on the server that requires a db connection.
There are no errors on server startup however, all the bindings are resolved correctly. Server is booted via cds watch --profile hybrid command.
Credentials for the connection to HANA are provided explicitly in package.json -> cds and are correct.

Rebinding/ restarting HANA instance does not have any impact, nor does restarting BAS workspace.
Below is a screenshot of the error.  

Any support would be much appreciated!

entry.title: app/router preview looking for a deleted project's path instead of it's own
entry.content:
Hello,

As a newbie at UI5 development, I am following the tutorial: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-create-ui.html

 

I decide to delete the original app MyHANAApp and instead created another App MyHANAApp2.

When I try to preview the ports, they do not work.

On previewing app/router, I got the below error:

#2.0#2024 12 02 18:00:02:348#+00:00#INFO#/Configuration#####m47c58h8##########m47c58h8#PLAIN##Replacing $XSAPPNAME will not take place - 'xsappname' property not found in UAA configuration.#

However, my package.json has the package name as MyHANApp2 and my mta.yaml also has the same name everywhere. On previewing Port 5000 from within MyHANAApp2, it gives the below error:

Error: ENOENT: no such file or directory, open '/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/@sap/cds/app/index.css'
    at Object.readFileSync (node:fs:457:20)
    at get html [as html] (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/@sap/cds/app/index.js:10:16)
    at /home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/@sap/cds/server.js:85:39
    at Layer.handle [as handle_request] (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/layer.js:95:5)
    at next (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/route.js:149:13)
    at Route.dispatch (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/route.js:119:3)
    at Layer.handle [as handle_request] (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/layer.js:95:5)
    at /home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:284:15
    at Function.process_params (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:346:12)
    at next (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:280:10)

 

It looks for MyHANAApp which I have already deleted. 

Also I connected the app with the new HANA Cloud Instance MyHANAApp2-Dev, and deleted the previous HDI Container, However, on going to the Database Explorer tab and refreshing , it does not show the container, but on navigating directly from My HANA Projects or searching manually within the Database Explorer using the + icon, I am able to load the DB Container. Although I think this is irrelevant, but thought of mentioning still

 

I do not want to create a new project with the exact same name as the tutorial, so that I can understand how the various components are interlinked, by resolving this error.

 

It is possible, that I might be a little vague in describing the problem, please let me know if I missed out anything, or should explain anything else in more detail.

 

Thanks

entry.title: CAP project for deployment to HANA XSA
entry.content:
Going through this link to create a CAP project in HANA XSA environment. https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/xsa-cap-create-project..html

Do we still follow the approach in the tutorial above or is it better to create CAP project using BAS and deploy to HANA XSA (using on-prem HANA DB) via XS tooling in BAS? 

please advise. @jung-thomas 

thanks

entry.title: I have observed an issue in CAP based Application. Can CAP team fix it ?
entry.content:
Launch sample application mentioned in capire documentation. http://localhost:4004/ Home page. CLick on Browse Books -> Preview ‒ List of AdminService.Books dropdown : Click on All my Apps : Again click on Preview ‒ List of AdminService.Books down Arrow. UI is distorted. Please refer screenshot Attched. 

Same thing happens in Actual Application. Exmple : Login to SCT Home page : Click on Manage File Upload tile :Manage File Uploads dropdown : All my Apps : Again click on Manage File Uploads dropdown down Arrow. Page is distorted.  Refer SCT screenshots Attched.

entry.title: Truncate table and mass upload with CAP
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I want to replicate a table with CAP. The entire table is to be “copied” with each run. This means that I first have to delete all entries from the target table and then write all rows from the source table to the target table.

If I do this with the standard CRUD operations, it takes quite a long time (there are approx. 165000 rows in the table).

Is there a possibility to do a “TRUNCATE” on the DB table and then a “mass upload”?

Many thanks and best regards
Heinrich

entry.title: Is the side-by-side BTP training updated with new course content? Found some bugs
entry.content:
Looks like this course contents are updated with different business example.

from risk-management -> incident-management. Unfortunately, we cannot copy code to test by ourselves and demo exercises are not clearly defined. There are few more bugs in the new content.

How to copy code?

Is it announced anywhere that SAP BTP is going to update the course content?

Please guide on this. Thanks.

Ref: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/build-side-by-side-extensions-on-sap-btp

entry.title: sap cap xs-security grant authorities for various applications
entry.content:
Hello, I am configuring security scopes for several applications that communicate with our SAP CAP, for which we have created application-type xsuaa services for each of them,

however when trying to give permissions in our scope for those services it keeps giving me 401 unauthorized

However when I only add one service to the scope, this one works fine for me Could you help me know what causes this behavior? greetings and thanks

entry.title: Call an Action in a Freestyle UI5 Application
entry.content:
Hello, 
I'm quite confused. I'm trying to call an Action in my Bound UI5 View. It should be straightforward, but when trying the commonly accepted approach: 

 

async onPress() {
            var oModel = this.getView().getModel();
            var oActionODataContextBinding = oModel.bindContext("/someAction()");
            oActionODataContextBinding.execute().then(
                function() {
                    var oActionContext = oActionODataContextBinding.getBoundContext();
                    console.table(oActionContext.getObject().value);
                }.bind(this)
            );

        }

I get the following error: 

EventProvider.fireEvent: Event Listener for event 'press' failed during execution. - Error: The binding must be deferred

I'm still a bit new to making UI5 Freestyle Application. So I someone could guide me through what is going on.

Thanks.

entry.title: CAP application with external API on BTP
entry.content:
Hi CAP experts!

I have developed couple of CAP applications on BTP with SAP backend before, but i have come to meet new challenge and going through various blogs I cant seem to locate the information pertaining my usecase, I only find blogs where external api is used as value helps, no as main data source.

The gist of the case is a simple one: need model based LR app with create/ediit functionality. But the issue is that data resides outside SAP systems - in external API, that I added as an destination to BTP and connected to CAP project in BAS, which imported it as xml and cds files in srv/external.

Now while testing local service I can see data, but no create or edit, which i assume is because I don't use local db..

So the question is - is there a way to achieve create app based on solely external data service and get out of the box create/edit? Should the data be replicated in hana db fully? or the way is to add create/edit functions as extensions on UI? or maybe draft functionality can be levergaed somehow differently?

Also thereto - is it possible to create such app using managed approuter or?

 

Thx,Shanir

entry.title: CAP using subqueries for case separation
entry.content:
Hi,

From the following table I am trying to get the the records grouped by RefA and RefB columns with the maximum value of Value1. In case the Value1 is same for multiple records, then the maximum value of Value2.

So only in this example the records 1 and 5.

IDRefARefBValue1Value2
1a1b1510
2a1b1315
3a1b135
4a2b1425
5a2b1435

Ideally I would like to do this operation with only one query and no server-side post processing.

In SQL the following query gets me the correct result.

-- Option 1: Subqueries for SQLite
SELECT
    a.RefA,
    a.RefB,
    MAX(a.Value1) AS max1,
    MAX(
        CASE
            WHEN a.Value1 = subquery.max1
	    THEN a.Value2
            ELSE NULL
        END
    ) AS max2
FROM table1 as a
JOIN (
    SELECT RefA, RefB, MAX(Value1) AS max1
    FROM table1
    GROUP BY RefA, RefB
) AS subquery
    ON a.RefA = subquery.RefA AND a.RefB = subquery.RefB
GROUP BY a.RefA, a.RefB;

-- Option 2: Window function in case separation (general)
SELECT
	RefA,
	RefB,
	MAX(Value1) AS max1,
	MAX(
		CASE
			WHEN Value1 = MAX(Value1) OVER(
				PARTITION BY RefA, RefB
			)
			THEN Value2
			ELSE null
		END
	) AS max2
FROM table1
GROUP BY RefA, RefB;

However, I don't know what the correct approach for this is in CAP. Can you help me with this?

Thanks in advance.

Atakan

entry.title: CAP Facade entity for SAP HANA Cloud view (or virtual view) with association
entry.content:
We have a need to consume an SAP HANA Cloud view from CAP.

We can access the view with the regular config (hdb synonyms & grants + facade entity)

but what if the view has association, is it supported by the CAP facade entity?

My other question would be if this view comes from an old backend via a virtual table in SAP HANA Cloud, would we be able to expose the CDS view association and proxy them over the facade entity in CAP?

thanks
